verdicts.note: Direction and magnitude fit the pole description exactly (ICE masking ban, surveillance limits), but every claim traces to one uncorroborated pamphlet statement [S1]; the website [S2] is not cited for any of it. Self-reported claims in a single source are medium, not high.
'Restoring abortion funding' is a single self-reported pamphlet claim [S1] with no corroboration and no broader social-policy platform documented. Single statement = medium confidence per the guide.

The only evidence is one item — 'stopping Flock camera surveillance' — cited in the dossier under civil liberties/immigration, not tech policy. Extrapolating a general AI/big-tech regulatory posture from one police-surveillance item is indirect inference (low), and his Microsoft technologist career is an uncounted signal in the other direction.

missing.basis: Dossier documents the work-the-system profile explicitly: backing from the outgoing incumbent, House Speaker, AG, County Executive, and city councilmembers [S2], pamphlet-touted 'unmatched endorsements' [S1], and delivery framed through establishment coalition work. His opponent scored +2 on this axis from the same dossier pair; the contrast evidence for -1 is at least as strong as several medium scores elsewhere in this batch.
